title: Rotten Tomatoes Predicts the 2026 Golden Globes Winners
text: According to Rotten Tomatoes' predictions by awards expert Jacqueline Coley, Rhea Seehorn from the series "Pluribus" is predicted to win Best Actress in a Television Drama at the 2026 Golden Globes. The article includes a photo from the show and identifies Seehorn as the predicted winner in this category. Rotten Tomatoes' expert predictions track predicted winners based on critical reception, fan engagement, and awards season momentum.
